Nie 等 - 2026 - COCODIFF CORRESPONDENCE-C.filename: Nie 等 - 2026 - COCODIFF CORRESPONDENCE-CONSISTENT DIFFU- SION MODEL FOR FINE-GRAINED STYLE TRANSFER.pdf
Nie 等 - 2026 - COCODIFF CORRESPONDENCE-C.title: COCODIFF: CORRESPONDENCE-CONSISTENT DIFFUSION MODEL FOR FINE-GRAINED STYLE TRANSFER
Nie 等 - 2026 - COCODIFF CORRESPONDENCE-C.summary: This paper introduces CoCoDiff, a novel training-free and low-cost style transfer framework for achieving fine-grained, semantically consistent stylization. CoCoDiff utilizes pretrained latent diffusion models and includes a pixel-wise semantic correspondence module and a cycle-consistency module to enforce structural and perceptual alignment, resulting in high-quality and semantically consistent style transfer.
